title: derris breviramosa
intro: Derris breviramosa, also known as the short-stemmed derris or short-stemmed locust bean, is a plant species native to tropical regions. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its lectins and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, protecting against cardiovascular disease, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Derris breviramosa is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional remedies like tonics and salves, although its preparations and usage should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
